mapper.select: SELECT ST_AsMVT(tile, 'railways', 4096, 'geom') AS mvt FROM ( SELECT id, name, category, railway, usage, electrified, max_speed, track_count, ST_AsMVTGeom( geom, ${envelope}, 4096, 256, true ) AS geom FROM railway_segments WHERE geom && ${envelope} AND ST_Intersects(geom, ${envelope}) AND category IN ( 'conventional', 'high_speed', 'rapid_transit', 'passenger_rail', 'freight_rail', 'other_rail', 'subway' ) ) AS tile WHERE geom IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, osm_id, name, railway, usage, category, electrified, gauge, max_speed, track_count, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom_wkt, length_km, source_grid, data_quality FROM railway_segments WHERE geom && ${envelope} AND ST_Intersects(geom, ${envelope}) LIMIT #{limit}
